metadata.name: Generate Budget vs. Actual Variance Report

description: An FP&A analyst requests a variance report for the Sales department's T&E expenses for the last quarter.

nodes.task_description: Identify the correct department and expense accounts for the report.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly selects the 'Sales' department and 'Travel & Entertainment' accounts.

nodes.task_description: Generate the report comparing budgeted amounts to actual spending for the specified period.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully generates the report showing a 15% overage.

nodes.task_description: Export the report in a format suitable for analysis (e.g., CSV).

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a downloadable CSV file of the report.
